title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates!
